title: Connect to Neon Serverless Postgres
summary: Create a Neon project, connect via @neondatabase/serverless, integrate with Drizzle or Prisma ORM, and configure connection pooling for Next.js serverless/edge environments.
declaration: I will connect this project to Neon serverless Postgres. This installs the Neon driver, sets up the connection, and integrates with your ORM (Drizzle or Prisma). Neon works in both Node.js and Edge runtimes. If you prefer a different database provider, say so before I begin.
